title: LimitedDeath
description: LimitedDeath is a Minecraft plugin that introduces a credit system for players, where credits regenerate over time. Upon player death, the regeneration process begins. Players with zero credits are not able to join the Server.
body:
LimitedDeath is a plugin designed to make Minecraft gameplay more interesting. It gives players credits, kind of like points. These credits automatically come back over time, like when you wait for something to recharge in a game. When a player dies, their credits start coming back even if they're not playing. If a player has no credits left, they can't play on the server until they get at least 1 Credit.

Currently a config exist but most Options dont work and will be fixed in Future.
Currently Every Player has a Max of 3 Credits, Regeneration takes 2h
Regeneration of Death Credits per Day is not limited
~~~~

    /ld setcoins <player> <count>: Lets server admins give or take away credits from a player.
    /ld show <player>: Shows how many credits a specific player has.
    /ld showall: Shows how many credits all players on the server have.
    /transfer <player>: Lets players give credits to each other. (Currently by transfering you lose 2 Credits)
